positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical circular mandala pattern featuring intertwining elements of cosmic astronomy and bioluminescent flora. The design must have strong, clean black silhouettes set against a deep midnight blue and nebula purple gradient background. Central elements include stylized crescent moons, nebula swirls, celestial rings, and glowing, exotic botanical leaves (e.g., fern, monstera). Use a Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) inspired aesthetic mixed with Art Nouveau geometry. Composition must be central and perfectly balanced, designed to read clearly when printed on fabric. Volumetric lighting, ultra-sharp details, high contrast, vector graphic quality.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, grainy, low resolution, noise, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, cartoon, graffiti, realistic photograph
